description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 8

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, F, M, P

This improved version of the Third Dance is much more powerful, completely ruining some lesser minds. This technique can only be used while the user is in the Meimu no Kamae stance. Instead of targeting and tensing the target's body, this technique makes the target hallucinate, his worst fears come to life in ways even the target's didn't think possible, making every step torture (i.e. A fear is amplified, so a fear of spiders would have the target on a web with millions of spiders on his body biting him, and a larger spider about to kill him).

All targets must make a will save every turn the user dances or it's fear will continue to increase. It is unable to move on a turn it fails it's save, and will slowly climb in fear ranks until it leaves the 45 ft. area.

1st failed save - Shaken

2nd failed save - Dazed

3rd failed save - Frightened

4th failed save - Panicked

5th failed save - Unconscious (lasts 1 round after the dance stops)

While performing this dance, the user counts as if being one Speed Rank higher than it currently is, as its moves becomes extremely difficult to interpret (up to a max of Rank 5).

Requires: Taijutsu 8 ranks; Meimu no Kamae(t)

Material Focus: To accurately perform this technique, the user needs specially made clothes, usually equipped with whistles or bells that cause the illusion. These clothes usually have a Cost DC of 10.
